g.text: Ask Lissel directly what materials she can provide for the next
Translation mostly clear. A few gaps.
You stand in the shadow of a jagged spire, the faint, unsettling
glow of the geysers casting strange shadows across the ice. I look at your
drone with quiet curiosity, not fear. Tell me, where does your ship come fro
and what troubles have brought you to Enceladus?
Ask Lissel to describe the local flora or fauna to assess
My solitude is deep, and I rarely venture from my caves, but I see
the distress in your bearing. If your troubles align with what I know, perha
